survive_in_the_woods.wikihow_title: How to Survive in the Woods

player.description: The person trying to survive in the woods.

location.description: A place in the wilderness such as camp, a path, a waterfall, or a grove.

direction.description: A direction used for moving between connected locations.

item.description: A physical object that can be carried or used.

water.description: Collected drinking water that may be untreated or treated.

get_water.description: Collect water from a nearby water source.
get_water.prerequisites: The player is at a location with a water source and has a container.
get_water.results: The player has water, but it is untreated.

strain_water.description: Use cloth or clothing to strain water.
strain_water.prerequisites: The player has untreated water and cloth.

boil_water.description: Boil strained water to kill contaminants.
boil_water.prerequisites: The player has water, a pot, and access to fire.

purify_in_sunlight.description: Use a clear plastic bottle and direct sunlight to purify water.
purify_in_sunlight.prerequisites: The player has water in a clear plastic container at a sunny location.

collect_kindling.description: Collect dry small material to help start a fire.
collect_kindling.prerequisites: Dry kindling is at the player's location.

collect_wood.description: Collect dry wood to maintain a fire.
collect_wood.prerequisites: Dry wood is at the player's location.

build_fire_pit.description: Prepare a safe place to make a fire.
build_fire_pit.prerequisites: The player is at the chosen location.
build_fire_pit.results: The location has a fire pit.

light_fire.description: Light a fire using dry kindling and wood.
light_fire.prerequisites: The player has dry kindling and wood at a location with a fire pit.

gather_leaves.description: Gather leaves to insulate or cover a shelter.
gather_leaves.prerequisites: Leaves are at the player's location.

cut_branches.description: Cut branches with a sharp tool.
cut_branches.prerequisites: The player has a sharp tool at a cuttable location.

build_shelter.description: Use branches and leaves to build a simple shelter.
build_shelter.prerequisites: The player has branch material and leaf material.

signal_rescue.description: Use a fire to make visible smoke for rescue.
signal_rescue.prerequisites: The player is at a location with fire.
signal_rescue.results: The player has signaled for rescue.

has_water_source.description: The location has a creek, stream, pond, waterfall, or other source of water.

untreated.description: Water has not yet been made safe.

strained.description: Large particles have been removed from water using cloth.

treated.description: Water has been purified and is safe to drink.

has_fire.description: A location has a lit fire that can boil water or make smoke.

sheltered.description: The player has built a shelter.

collect_water.step_contents: Search for a source of fresh water. Look for signs of fresh water nearby like areas of green foliage, low-lying areas where water could be collected, and signs of wildlife.

get_water: Search for a source of fresh water

has_water_source: a creek, stream, or pond is nearby

purify_water.step_contents: Purify any water that you find. Use a piece of cloth or clothing to strain the water, then boil the water for 10 minutes. A clear plastic bottle in direct sunlight can also purify water.

strain_water: Use a piece of cloth or clothing to strain the water
purify_in_sunlight: place the bottle on its side in direct sunlight for 6 hours

treated: purify any water that you find

build_shelter.step_contents: A survival plan also needs shelter. In this PDDL problem I model gathering leaves, cutting branches, and using those materials to build a simple shelter.
